title: Wild Force Shard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:WildForceShard Red.png|thumb|right|200px|A red Wild Force Shard]]
'''Wild Force Shard''' was a name given to [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] that were imbued with the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and, in turn, could exponentially enhance the [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] of an individual. The crystal would resonate in the Force itself and, as such, had no affinity with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark]] or [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]]; instead, it simply influenced the vicinity it was located in. It was for this reason that the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] never used such Force crystals, as they could easily amplify dark side or light side powers and potentially turn a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to the dark side. [[Color/Legends|Red]] and blue variants were known to exist.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''
